developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback. We truly appreciate you taking the time to share your experience with our game.

We’re happy to inform you that we have just released a new update for Table Tennis, where we have resolved the reported issues and significantly improved overall gameplay performance and stability.

We kindly invite you to update the game and try the latest version. Your feedback is very important to us, and we hope you’ll reconsider your review after experiencing the improvements.

Thank you for supporting us.
